summary: Captured the March 27 Apache and FireFlow session-bridge window showing BusinessFlow health activity alongside FireFlow UserSession validation, getUserSession, bridge refresh, getAFASessionInfo, and retained FASessionId resolution.
follow_up_recommendations: Compare the ff-session values in this window against the BusinessFlow-side caller or cookie issuer that triggers /FireFlow/api/session, especially the branch that falls back through /fa/environment/getAFASessionInfo.
Inspect the FireFlow AFF API request payloads or debug logs around FireFlowAffApi/NoAuth/CommandsDispatcher if a later delegated slice allows deeper tracing.
